implementation_drift.description: Caught two substring misreads in real-time: 'tridosha' is NOT substring of 'Tridoshic' (final 'a' vs 'ic') and 'tridosha' NOT in 'Tridosho' (final 'a' vs 'o'). Corrected the overlap counts in-line. Honest about the rule-edge-case checks.

honest_note: Program explicitly named Ayurvedic dosha as untested sub-doctrine. Tried it; found that the LLM-side prior art is dense (AI Agent Behavioral Science 2506.06366, AgentMisalignment 2506.04018, Agent Drift 2601.04170 with three intervention approaches, exploration-exploitation balance literature). Tridosha-as-LLM-constitution analogy isn't directly imported but the multi-axis-behavioral-profile-plus-interventions umbrella is firmly occupied. Continues the saturation pattern: program-suggested 'untested' candidates often have direct umbrella coverage from 2025 agent-engineering papers.
